samples.raw: We need to output JSON valid on one line with fields: "titlu","fapt","ce_inseamna","categorie". Must be original Romanian summary, no translation word-for-word. Use correct terms. Must be neutral, 1-2

We need to output JSON on one line: {"titlu":"titlul tradus","fapt":"o propoziție cu faptul principal"}.

We must translate title naturally and correctly, using given mappings: oil=țiței NU ulei, bond
